response:
Welcome! Your current inventory is empty, which means no revenue can be generated. The immediate priority is to acquire and prepare digital assets for sale.

Focus on sourcing high-demand assets to build your initial inventory quickly and efficiently.

suggested_tasks.title: **Define Acquisition Strategy
suggested_tasks.description: ** Identify 2-3 high-potential digital asset categories to focus your sourcing efforts on.

suggested_tasks.title: **Acquire First Assets
suggested_tasks.description: ** Begin sourcing and acquiring a batch of digital assets within your chosen categories.

suggested_tasks.title: **Prepare for Listing
suggested_tasks.description: ** Initiate the process of preparing acquired assets so they can be approved and listed quickly.
